notes: BARseq acquisition performed across multiple slides imaged over multiple days on the Dogwood spinning disk confocal. Raw data stored at smb://allen/aind/stage/barseq/. Full acquisition includes gene sequencing (7 cycles), barcode sequencing (15 cycles), and one hybridization cycle. Each slide folder contains all three acquisition types. Final processed output is a cell x gene x barcode table registered to Allen CCFv3. Processed output: s3://aind-private-data-prod-o5171v/780345_2025-02-20_00-00-00/BARseq/combined_neurons_clust_CCFv2.mat.

data_streams.notes: Acquired externally by BARseq imaging team.
